name: Orange-Poppy Seed Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups all-purpose flour (unbleached or cake flour)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Coat two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
Beat the egg, egg white, sugar, and vegetable oil together in an electric mixer until smooth.
Add the cream cheese, orange juice, and dried orange rind; beat again.
Add the flour, baking soda, salt, and poppy seeds; mix until well combined.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto the cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks. Repeat with remaining batter.
